compartments.label: Lumen
compartments.snippet: Label in upper-left region above the brush-border of the intestinal cell.

compartments.label: Intestinal cell
compartments.snippet: Large box compartment labeled 'Intestinal cell' at bottom-left; contains all intracellular nodes.

compartments.label: Nucleus
compartments.snippet: Large pink/red oval inside the intestinal cell labeled 'Nucleus'; contains ESRE, cellular stress response genes, antimicrobial defence genes.

compartments.label: Mitochondria
compartments.snippet: Blue organelle shape inside the intestinal cell labeled 'Mitochondria'; contains UPR^mt and mtROS nodes.

compartments.label: LRO stress / pH increase
compartments.snippet: Small circular vesicle/organelle labeled 'LRO stress / pH increase' on the left side inside the intestinal cell.

genes.snippet: Node labeled 'TIR-1/SARM1' inside the intestinal cell, left branch.
Node labeled 'NSY-1 / MAPKKK' inside the intestinal cell, left branch.
Node labeled 'SEK-1 / MAPKK' inside the intestinal cell, left branch.
Node labeled 'PMK-1 / p38 MAPK' inside the intestinal cell, left branch.
Node labeled 'HSP-60' inside the intestinal cell, center area, connected from UPR^mt/Mitochondria and ATFS-1.
Purple box labeled 'ATFS-1 / ATF-4' left of mitochondria inside the intestinal cell.
Purple box labeled 'HIF-1' inside the intestinal cell, center branch.
Purple box labeled 'AMPK' to the right of mitochondria inside the intestinal cell.
Purple box labeled 'DAF-16 / FOXO' inside the intestinal cell, left branch, downstream of PMK-1.
Purple box labeled 'SKN-1 / Nrf2' inside the intestinal cell, stacked with DAF-16 and HSF-1.
Purple box labeled 'HSF-1' inside the intestinal cell, stacked with DAF-16 and SKN-1.
Purple box labeled 'ATF-7' lower-left inside the intestinal cell, downstream of PMK-1.
Purple box labeled 'ZIP-4' on the right side inside the intestinal cell.
Purple box labeled 'CEBP-1/2' on the right side inside the intestinal cell; may represent CEBP-1 and/or CEBP-2.
Purple box labeled 'CEBP-1/2' on the right side inside the intestinal cell; second gene in the combined label.
Purple box labeled 'ZIP-2' on the right side inside the intestinal cell, downstream of Translation inhibition.
Purple box labeled 'NHR-86 / HNF-4' at bottom-right near the nucleus/membrane, downstream of PCN (faint).
Blue transmembrane receptor symbol on the right side of the intestinal cell membrane, labeled 'FSHR-1'.

tentative_edges.snippet: Pyocyanin (green hexagon in Lumen) solid pointed arrow descending to TIR-1/SARM1 in intestinal cell.
TIR-1/SARM1 solid pointed arrow to 'LRO stress / pH increase' vesicle.
'LRO stress / pH increase' solid pointed arrow to NSY-1.
NSY-1 (MAPKKK) solid pointed arrow to SEK-1 (MAPKK).
SEK-1 (MAPKK) solid pointed arrow to PMK-1 (p38 MAPK).
PMK-1 solid pointed arrow to DAF-16/FOXO.
PMK-1 solid pointed arrow to ATF-7 (lower left).
DAF-16/FOXO solid pointed arrow to 'cellular stress response genes' in nucleus.
SKN-1/Nrf2 solid pointed arrow to 'cellular stress response genes' in nucleus.
HSF-1 solid pointed arrow to 'cellular stress response genes' in nucleus.
ATF-7 solid pointed arrow to 'antimicrobial defence genes' in nucleus.
Pyoverdine (green hexagon in Lumen) solid pointed arrow toward Mitochondria / +Fe³⁺; exact arrowhead uncertain.
UPR^mt inside Mitochondria solid pointed arrow to HSP-60; line runs left.
ATFS-1/ATF-4 to HSP-60 connecting line; uncertain per transcription.
ATFS-1/ATF-4 solid pointed arrow into nucleus toward 'cellular stress response genes'.
mtROS (inside Mitochondria) solid pointed arrow to AMPK.
AMPK solid pointed arrow to HIF-1; direction uncertain per transcription (AMPK adjacent to HIF-1).
HIF-1 solid pointed arrow to ESRE in nucleus.
ExoA (green hexagon in Lumen) T-bar blunt arrow inhibiting Translation inside intestinal cell.
Translation solid pointed arrow descending to ZIP-2; uncertain per transcription. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
ZIP-4 solid pointed arrow to ESRE in nucleus.
CEBP-1/2 solid pointed arrow to ESRE in nucleus.
CEBP-1/2 solid pointed arrow to ESRE in nucleus; second gene of combined label.
ZIP-2 solid pointed arrow to 'antimicrobial defence genes' in nucleus.
ZIP-2 blunt T-bar to ESRE in nucleus; uncertain whether this edge is inhibitory per transcription.
FSHR-1 dashed arrow downward labeled '?' toward nucleus/genes; downstream target unknown.
PCN (green hexagon in Lumen) descending arrow toward NHR-86; target uncertain and faint per transcription.
NHR-86/HNF-4 solid pointed arrow to 'antimicrobial defence genes' in nucleus.
ESRE solid pointed arrow to 'cellular stress response genes' within nucleus; uncertain per transcription.
ESRE solid pointed arrow to 'antimicrobial defence genes' within nucleus; uncertain per transcription.
ROS box adjacent to HSF-1 with no clearly drawn outgoing arrow; connection faint/ambiguous per transcription. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
